column1: # ANIMA offline translation seed — Italian <-> English.
# Single source of truth, hand-curated for QUALITY (grounded, zero hallucination).
# Format:  <it terms>\t<en terms>   — synonyms within a cell separated by ';'.
#   Lines starting with '#' and blank lines are ignored.
#   gen_dicts.py normalizes the SOURCE side of each direction exactly like the device
#   tokenizer (lowercase + Italian accent fold) and emits sorted dict-it-en.tsv /
#   Scope is word + common-phrase — this is a dictionary/phrasebook, not a sentence MT.
